package rulecoverage

func NegativeBytesTrimleftSpaceTrimspace() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_trimleft_space_trimspace"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`bytes.TrimLeft(..., whitespace)` instead of `bytes.TrimSpace(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
